summary: Ranging regime continues across all 5 Tier-1 tickers. BUY-side collapse persists: 16 signals have BUY accuracy <40% at 1d_recent. SELL-side remains healthy (50-100%). Key changes from Apr-28: calendar collapsed from 57.0% alltime to 30.2% recent (-26.8pp, 520 sam), sentiment degraded to 21.3%, ema and news_event are biggest improvers (+26.1pp, +23.5pp). 3h horizon remains dramatically healthier than 1d.

top_signals.name: econ_calendar
top_signals.note: SELL-only. 95.5% recent but small sample (44). Alltime 62.9% (4661 sam) robust. Per-ticker: BTC/ETH 1.8% (gated), XAG 29.5% (gated). Works best on XAU/MSTR.

top_signals.name: news_event
top_signals.note: SELL-only at 1d (75.0%, 244 sam). Strong at both horizons. Biggest improver at 1d (+23.5pp).

top_signals.name: ema
top_signals.note: SELL-only recently (76.1%, 67 sam). Massive improvement but alltime flat 50.0% so regime-driven.

top_signals.name: bb
top_signals.note: BUY 46.8%, SELL 84.1% at 1d_recent. Strong at 1d but collapsed at 3h (41.7%). Correctly unclustered.

top_signals.name: ministral
top_signals.note: SELL=100% recent (39 sam), BUY=10.3% (29 sam). Extreme SELL dominance. Stable across horizons.

top_signals.name: qwen3
top_signals.note: No recent 1d data. Alltime SELL=74.3% excellent. BUY=31.0% weak. Strong at 3h (61.8%).

top_signals.name: rsi
top_signals.note: BUY=43.1%, SELL=79.8% at 1d_recent. SELL carrying the signal. Degraded at 3h (47.2%).

top_signals.name: oscillators
top_signals.note: Was disabled (45.9% alltime). Recent 62.7% (102 sam). SELL=70.0% (80 sam). Still bad at 3h (39.4%).

worst_signals.name: sentiment
worst_signals.diagnosis: WORST performer. 98% BUY bias (147/3). BUY=19.7%. Bad at ALL horizons. Structural bullish bias.
worst_signals.recommendation: Already accuracy-gated and regime-gated. Model calibration needed long-term.

worst_signals.name: calendar
worst_signals.diagnosis: MASSIVE COLLAPSE -26.8pp (520 sam). 100% BUY bias. Day-of-week seasonals emit BUY in ranging.
worst_signals.recommendation: Accuracy gate + directional gate catch this. Will recover on regime change.

worst_signals.name: realized_skewness
worst_signals.diagnosis: 88.9% BUY bias. BUY=27.5%, SELL=80.0% (10 sam). Already disabled.
worst_signals.recommendation: Remain disabled. BUY direction actively harmful.

worst_signals.name: momentum_factors
worst_signals.diagnosis: BUY=17.1% (496 sam), SELL=51.4% (471 sam). Massive BUY-side failure but 60.1% at 3h.
worst_signals.recommendation: Accuracy-gated at 1d. SELL=51.4% below rescue threshold (55%).

worst_signals.name: structure
worst_signals.diagnosis: BUY=27.5% (610 sam), SELL=54.5% (264 sam). 69.8% BUY bias. Breakout detection in ranging.
worst_signals.recommendation: Accuracy-gated. SELL=54.5% marginally below 55% rescue threshold.

worst_signals.name: claude_fundamental
worst_signals.diagnosis: 99.5% BUY bias (919/5). BUY=35.6%. LLM cascade structural bullish bias. -22.5pp.
worst_signals.recommendation: MACRO_WINDOW_FORCE_HOLD + regime-gated + per-ticker disabled. Maximum gating applied.

worst_signals.name: crypto_macro
worst_signals.diagnosis: 100% BUY. BUY=38.6%. On-chain metrics bullish but price not responding.

worst_signals.name: volume_flow
worst_signals.diagnosis: BUY=21.0% (500 sam), SELL=55.6% (473 sam). In trend_direction (0.12x). Weak both horizons.
worst_signals.recommendation: SELL rescued at 0.7x. Maximum gating applied.

worst_signals.name: heikin_ashi
worst_signals.diagnosis: BUY=22.9% (367 sam), SELL=58.3% (384 sam). Trend overlay fails in ranging. 55.0% at 3h.

worst_signals.name: smart_money
worst_signals.diagnosis: BUY=14.9%, SELL=62.1%. Globally disabled. 63.2% at 3h (133 sam).
worst_signals.recommendation: Remain disabled. Monitor 3h for re-enable (needs 200+ samples).

correlation_clusters.current_state: Most members regime-gated in ranging. At 3h, trend (61.6%) and momentum_factors (60.1%) are strong but penalized to 0.12x.
correlation_clusters.problem: At 3h in ranging, trend/momentum_factors/heikin_ashi >55% but get 0.12x. Wastes their 3h edge.

correlation_clusters.current_state: news_event (67.9% blended) is leader. sentiment (28.7%) and calendar (38.2%) are dead weight.
correlation_clusters.recommendation: Bias penalty (0.5x at >85% BUY) should catch calendar/sentiment.

correlation_clusters.problem: When they escape gating on regime transition, both emit identical wrong BUY.
correlation_clusters.recommendation: Verify group leader gating at 46% threshold is active.

correlation_clusters.problem: BUY accuracy <25% for both. SELL direction works.
correlation_clusters.recommendation: Directional gate catches BUY sides. No change.

correlation_clusters.note: bb intentionally unclustered. LLM signals independent. volume independent.

regime_performance.key_finding: BUY-side accuracy catastrophically low across 16 signals. SELL-side healthy (50-100%). Ranging penalty (0.75x) insufficient for true 30-50% accuracy loss.

per_ticker_consensus.diagnosis: MSTR weakest at both horizons. ETH-USD near coin-flip. XAU/XAG healthy at 3h but coin-flip at 1d. Only BTC-USD has 1d edge (52.5%). System has no 1d edge on 4 of 5 tickers.

directional_rescue_analysis.description: Signals failing overall gate but with one direction above 55% rescue threshold (0.7x weight)

recommendations.action: MONITOR: calendar collapsed 26.8pp (520 sam). Caught by accuracy + directional gate.
recommendations.rationale: 100% BUY bias at 30.2%. Will recover on regime change. No code change needed.

recommendations.action: INVESTIGATE: horizon-aware correlation groups for trend_direction cluster at 3h.
recommendations.rationale: trend/momentum_factors/heikin_ashi have 60%+ at 3h but get 0.12x follower penalty.

recommendations.action: VALIDATE: oscillators recovering at 1d (62.7%, 102 sam). Currently disabled.
recommendations.rationale: SELL=70.0% (80 sam). Wait for 200+ samples before re-enabling at 1d.

recommendations.action: NOTE: system has NO 1d edge on ETH/XAG/XAU/MSTR. Only BTC-USD (52.5%) marginal.
recommendations.rationale: Layer 2 should weight 3h consensus more heavily than 1d for metals.

recommendations.action: VALIDATE: bb unclustered status. 61.7% at 1d, 41.7% at 3h.
recommendations.rationale: Apr-26 decision validated at 1d. 3h penalty (0.6x horizon weight) working.

recommendations.action: MONITOR: sentiment worst signal (21.3% 1d, 33.8% 3h). Fully gated.
recommendations.rationale: Structural bullish bias. Long-term fix needs model recalibration.

recommendations.action: CONFIRM: directional rescue operating on 4 signals (SELL at 55.6-59.6%).
recommendations.rationale: Without rescue, system loses 4 directionally-correct SELL voters.

recommendations.action: CONSIDER: smart_money 3h re-enable. 63.2% at 3h (133 sam) promising.
recommendations.rationale: Wait for 200+ samples before adding to DISABLED_SIGNAL_OVERRIDES.

meta_analysis.system_health: Gating system (accuracy 47%, directional 40%, regime, per-ticker, correlation, directional rescue) is functioning correctly. All 16+ degraded signals suppressed while 8 healthy signals preserved.
meta_analysis.effective_active_1d: ~8 signals: rsi (59.7%), bb (61.7%), news_event (67.9%), ministral (60.8%), qwen3 (60.0%), momentum (55.3%), mean_reversion (54.1%), volume (54.8%). Plus SELL from 4 directionally-rescued trend signals.
meta_analysis.effective_active_3h: ~12 signals: news_event (66.6%), qwen3 (61.1%), ema (59.7%), ministral (59.5%), momentum_factors (58.3%), trend (55.2%), volatility_sig (56.3%), heikin_ashi (53.0%), fear_greed (53.7%), momentum (53.5%), candlestick (51.6%), macro_regime (50.7%).
meta_analysis.key_risk: Ranging regime compressed active 1d voters to ~8. If 2-3 more degrade, circuit breaker (5-voter floor) triggers gate relaxation.
meta_analysis.vs_apr28: calendar collapsed (57->30.2%), sentiment worsened (33.8->21.3%), oscillators improved (45.9->62.7%), ema improved (50->76.1%). BUY-side continues degrading, SELL-side strengthening.
